title: Magmaphile
description: Lets you change the height at which lava pools generate.
body:
Art by [agroV](https://www.twitch.tv/agrov)! Simple mixin mod that allows players to change the height at which lava pools generate from Y -57 (Defaults to Y -117). Especially useful for datapacks like Expanded World, in which the world height is modified, but the lava pool generation isn't.

Like the mod? Support the developer! <3

Looking for a Modded SMP Developer/Manager? Reach out!

Most of my experience as a Minecraft Modder comes from setting up, hosting and managing Minecraft servers for friends, as well as developing context-specific mods for said servers.
Recently, I've taken a liking for providing this service professionally.
[Agro's Fancy Fixes](https://modrinth.com/mod/agros-fancy-fixes) and [Magmaphile](https://modrinth.com/mod/magmaphile) are two such examples - both of which made entirely for a [content creator's modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/agropack), hosted on a server managed by me.

If you'd like to start your own SMP, be it for friends or a large community, and either want to delegate the boring, menial tasks of setting it up and managing a server, or want consulting/assistance from someone experienced in handling modpacks, mod conflicts, and nuances of modded Minecraft, I can help you with it! You can contact me through the following:
Email - `malory@onenetbeyond.org`
Discord - `maloryware`
